name: local.realm.info
title: About the realm (PROTOTYPE)
comment: INTERNAL PROTOTYPE — never published to cp.padi.io. The realm/orchestrator is the provider, publishing facts about itself: software version, uptime, capacity of the realm database, and how busy it is. Any client (Monitor, Widget, PWA) is a consumer. This local.* profile exists to explore the dashboard UX before the real padi.realm.info contract is designed; the local.* namespace resolves from the app's own profiles/ folder, not the registry.

properties.name: version
properties.description: CNS software version the realm is running

properties.name: keys
properties.description: Keys held in the realm database

properties.name: load
properties.description: How busy the realm is, 0 (idle) to 10 (saturated)
